verdict.prediction: 法国以 68% 概率赢得 2026 国际足联世界杯冠军, 决赛在 MetLife 球场 2-2 战平阿根廷, 经加时后通过点球大战取胜。姆巴佩处于巅峰窗口, 阵容深度冠绝 32 强, 助法国半决赛 18% 概率 淘汰巴西晋级。阿根廷 (10%) 和德国 (8%) 为次要挑战者, 巴西因安切洛蒂体系不稳被压至 18% (小组赛 6 分)、难以再现 2002 年七战全胜轨迹。
key_dynamics: 法国凭姆巴佩巅峰 + 阵容深度 (卡马文加 / 扎伊尔-埃梅里 接替老化核心) 居 68% 头号热门
巴西凭维尼修斯-罗德里戈-拉菲尼亚攻击三叉戟成头号挑战者, 但安切洛蒂体系不稳成隐患
阿根廷上限受梅西大腿伤势不确定性限制, 贝尔林厄姆领衔的辅佐阵容填补有限
小组赛多场冷门风险被标 (突尼斯 vs 日本、伊朗 vs 比利时、塞内加尔胜挪威、佛得角进 R32)
东道主 (美国 / 墨西哥 / 加拿大) 凭主场优势保住小组出线, 但缺乏淘汰赛深度

signals.signal: 法国阵容均衡 + 姆巴佩巅峰窗口 | 正向 0.85
巴西攻击人才厚度 (维尼修斯 / 罗德里戈 / 拉菲尼亚) | 正向 0.72
阿根廷梅西伤势不确定性 + 年龄 | 负向 0.55
巴西安切洛蒂体系不稳定 | 负向 0.45
多组 (F/G/H/I) 小组赛冷门风险并存 | 中性 0.60
东道主主场优势 (美国 / 墨西哥 / 加拿大) | 正向 0.50
德国死亡 E 组 + 同组同时开球压力 | 负向 0.40

best_thirds.reason: rank 1 捷克 (A): M82 对比利时
rank 2 波黑 (B): M81 对土耳其
rank 3 苏格兰 (C): M79 对韩国
rank 4 科特迪瓦 (E): M74 对德国
rank 5 瑞典 (F): M77 对法国
rank 6 埃及 (G): M85 对加拿大
rank 7 佛得角 (H): M80 对英格兰
rank 8 挪威 (I): M87 对葡萄牙

final.combined_text: 法国 68% / 阿根廷 10%。姆巴佩获金球奖, 卡马文加获最佳年轻球员。法国在 MetLife 加时 2-2 后点球大战取胜, 捧起队史第三座世界杯。模型引述: "姆巴佩巅峰 + 卡马文加接棒 + 阵容深度 = 不可阻挡的三位一体。"

upset_risks.rationale: #1 塞内加尔胜挪威 (I 组 MD3): 速度 vs 结构, FIFA 官方标红
#2 伊朗逼平比利时 (G 组 MD2): 低位防守 vs 比利时老化后防
#3 突尼斯逼平日本 (F 组 MD2): 反击 vs 控球型球队

upset_risks.match: Curaçao snatching a point vs Ecuador (Group E MD2)
upset_risks.rationale: #4 库拉索在厄瓜多尔身上抢一分 (E 组 MD2): 弱旅斗志
#5 克罗地亚淘汰葡萄牙: 莫德里奇告别赛经验

report_markdown:
# 2026 FIFA World Cup Prediction Report — Round 6

## Executive Summary

France are 68% favorites to lift the trophy at MetLife on 7/19, with Mbappé in his prime window and the deepest squad in the tournament. Brazil (18%) are the primary challenger on pure attacking talent, while Argentina (10%) trail on Messi-fitness uncertainty. The Final is projected as France vs Argentina, ending 2-2 AET with France winning on penalties. Twelve groups, 32 R32 matches, and four knockout rounds follow — all built from corrected MD2/MD3 matchups per the R6 mandate.

---

## All 12 Groups — MD2 + MD3 Match Predictions

### Group A (Mexico, South Korea, Czech Republic, TBD)

| Match | Date (UTC) | A win% | Draw% | B win% | Most Likely | Top 3 Scores |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Mexico vs South Korea (MD3)** | 6/24 19:00 | 42 | 28 | 30 | 1-1 | 1-1, 2-1, 1-0 |
| (Other MD2 fixtures per file) | — | — | — | — | — | — |

South Korea top after the Czech 2-1 MD1 win; Mexico 2nd via goal difference. Czech Republic finish 3rd.

### Group B (Canada, Switzerland, Bosnia, TBD)

| Match | Date (UTC) | A win% | Draw% | B win% | Most Likely | Top 3 Scores |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Canada vs Switzerland (MD3)** | 6/24 19:00 | 38 | 30 | 32 | 1-1 | 1-1, 2-1, 1-0 |

Canada top as host with home-field edge in Vancouver; Switzerland 2nd on goal difference. Bosnia 3rd.

### Group C (Brazil, Haiti, Morocco, Scotland)

| Match | Date (UTC) | A win% | Draw% | B win% | Most Likely | Top 3 Scores |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Brazil vs Haiti (MD2)** | 6/20 00:30 | 88 | 8 | 4 | 4-0 | 4-0, 3-0, 5-0 |
| **Brazil vs Scotland (MD3)** | 6/24 22:00 | 78 | 14 | 8 | 3-1 | 3-1, 2-0, 3-0 |
| **Haiti vs Morocco (MD3)** | 6/24 22:00 | 22 | 25 | 53 | 1-2 | 1-2, 0-2, 1-3 |

Ancelotti's emergency-installed system is unstable, but the Vinicius–Rodrygo–Raphinha attacking trio overwhelms minnows. Brazil top, Morocco 2nd (2022 semifinal pedigree), Scotland 3rd.

### Group D (USA, Paraguay, Turkey, Australia)

| Match | Date (UTC) | A win% | Draw% | B win% | Most Likely | Top 3 Scores |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Paraguay vs Turkey (MD2)** | 6/20 03:00 | 35 | 30 | 35 | 1-1 | 1-1, 0-1, 1-0 |

USA's home-field advantage carries them top. Turkey 2nd on tiebreaker over Paraguay. Australia finish last.

### Group E (Germany, Ecuador, Ivory Coast, Curaçao)

| Match | Date (UTC) | A win% | Draw% | B win% | Most Likely | Top 3 Scores |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Germany vs Ivory Coast (MD2)** | 6/20 20:00 | 72 | 16 | 12 | 3-1 | 3-1, 2-0, 3-0 |
| **Ecuador vs Curaçao (MD2)** | 6/21 00:00 | 62 | 22 | 16 | 2-0 | 2-0, 1-0, 3-0 |
| **Germany vs Ecuador (MD3)** | 6/25 20:00 | 58 | 24 | 18 | 2-1 | 2-1, 1-0, 2-0 |
| **Ivory Coast vs Curaçao (MD3)** | 6/25 20:00 | 66 | 22 | 12 | 2-0 | 2-0, 3-0, 2-1 |

Australia's agent flagged: "Germany's E group is brutal… simultaneous kickoff means goal difference matters." Musiala + Wirtz fire Germany top. Ecuador 2nd, Ivory Coast 3rd on points.

### Group F (Netherlands, Sweden, Japan, Tunisia)

| Match | Date (UTC) | A win% | Draw% | B win% | Most Likely | Top 3 Scores |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Netherlands vs Sweden (MD2)** | 6/20 17:00 | 54 | 24 | 22 | 2-1 | 2-1, 1-0, 2-0 |
| **Japan vs Tunisia (MD2)** | 6/21 04:00 | 62 | 22 | 16 | 2-0 | 2-0, 1-0, 3-0 |

Depay's recurring injuries temper Netherlands slightly, but Gakpo carries the line. Netherlands top, Japan 2nd. Tunisia upset-watch flagged by FIFA: "Tunisia holding Japan in F MD2." Sweden finish 3rd on goal difference.

### Group G (Belgium, Iran, Egypt, New Zealand)

| Match | Date (UTC) | A win% | Draw% | B win% | Most Likely | Top 3 Scores |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Belgium vs Iran (MD2)** | 6/21 19:00 | 60 | 24 | 16 | 2-0 | 2-0, 2-1, 1-0 |
| **Egypt vs New Zealand (MD2)** | 6/22 01:00 | 68 | 20 | 12 | 2-0 | 2-0, 3-0, 2-1 |

Belgium top; Iran 2nd despite FIFA-flagged upset risk ("Iran drawing Belgium in G MD2"). Egypt 3rd on goal difference over New Zealand.

### Group H (Spain, Saudi Arabia, Cape Verde, Uruguay)

| Match | Date (UTC) | A win% | Draw% | B win% | Most Likely | Top 3 Scores |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Saudi Arabia vs Spain (MD2)** | 6/21 16:00 | 12 | 18 | 70 | 0-3 | 0-3, 0-2, 1-3 |
| **Cape Verde vs Uruguay (MD2)** | 6/21 22:00 | 28 | 30 | 42 | 0-1 | 0-1, 1-1, 0-2 |

Spain top after the Cape Verde 0-0 draw; Uruguay 2nd on experience. Cape Verde qualify as 3rd on the historic point. Lamine Yamal at 18 is the breakout star.

### Group I (France, Iraq, Norway, Senegal)

| Match | Date (UTC) | A win% | Draw% | B win% | Most Likely | Top 3 Scores |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **France vs Iraq (MD2)** | 6/22 21:00 | 86 | 9 | 5 | 3-0 | 3-0, 4-0, 2-0 |
| **Norway vs Senegal (MD2)** | 6/23 00:00 | 40 | 28 | 32 | 1-1 | 1-1, 1-0, 0-1 |

Algeria's agent post nailed it: "Mbappé in his prime, Camavinga + Zaïre-Emery replacing aging Kanté/Pogba gives us the most balanced XI in the tournament." France top at a canter. Senegal 2nd on FIFA-flagged upset over Norway. Norway scrape through as 3rd.

### Group J (Argentina, Austria, Algeria, Jordan)

| Match | Date (UTC) | A win% | Draw% | B win% | Most Likely | Top 3 Scores |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Argentina vs Austria (MD2)** | 6/22 17:00 | 74 | 16 | 10 | 2-0 | 2-0, 3-0, 2-1 |
| **Algeria vs Jordan (MD2)** | 6/23 03:00 | 64 | 22 | 14 | 2-0 | 2-0, 3-0, 2-1 |

Argentina rebound from the 3-0 MD1 win. Bellingham's agent post: "J group should close with Argentina + Algeria through, but Messi's thigh is the ceiling." Algeria recover from MD1 loss to finish 2nd.

### Group K (Portugal, Uzbekistan, Colombia, DR Congo)

| Match | Date (UTC) | A win% | Draw% | B win% | Most Likely | Top 3 Scores |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Portugal vs Uzbekistan (MD2)** | 6/23 17:00 | 80 | 12 | 8 | 3-0 | 3-0, 2-0, 4-0 |
| **Colombia vs DR Congo (MD3)** | 6/24 02:00 | 58 | 24 | 18 | 2-0 | 2-0, 2-1, 1-0 |

Ronaldo's farewell tour carries Portugal top. Colombia (FIFA #12) 2nd; Uzbekistan 3rd on tournament debut.

### Group L (England, Ghana, Croatia, Panama)

| Match | Date (UTC) | A win% | Draw% | B win% | Most Likely | Top 3 Scores |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **England vs Ghana (MD2)** | 6/23 20:00 | 72 | 16 | 12 | 2-0 | 2-0, 3-0, 2-1 |
| **Croatia vs Panama (MD2)** | 6/23 23:00 | 78 | 14 | 8 | 3-0 | 3-0, 2-0, 4-0 |

Argentina's agent: "England's L group is favorable… Bellingham + Saka at peak, but Maguire and Stones aging — defensive depth is the only concern." England top, Croatia 2nd (Modrić farewell), Ghana 3rd.

---

## 8 Best Third-Place Teams (Distinct)

Per the R32 bracket pools, the 8 qualifying 3rd-place finishers:

1. **Czech Republic (A)** — Match 82 vs Belgium
2. **Bosnia (B)** — Match 81 vs Turkey
3. **Scotland (C)** — Match 79 vs South Korea
4. **Ivory Coast (E)** — Match 74 vs Germany
5. **Sweden (F)** — Match 77 vs France
6. **Egypt (G)** — Match 85 vs Canada
7. **Cape Verde (H)** — Match 80 vs England
8. **Norway (I)** — Match 87 vs Portugal

All distinct; all fit the bracket's permissible sets.

---

## Round of 32 (Matches 73–88)

| # | Matchup | A win% | Draw% | B win% | Most Likely | AET% | Pen% |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 73 | Mexico vs Switzerland | 44 | 28 | 28 | 1-0 | 18 | 8 |
| 74 | Germany vs **Ivory Coast** | 70 | 18 | 12 | 3-1 | 10 | 4 |
| 75 | Netherlands vs Morocco | 52 | 24 | 24 | 2-1 | 22 | 9 |
| 76 | Brazil vs Japan | 76 | 14 | 10 | 2-0 | 8 | 3 |
| 77 | France vs **Sweden** | 84 | 10 | 6 | 3-0 | 4 | 2 |
| 78 | Ecuador vs Senegal | 38 | 28 | 34 | 1-2 | 24 | 10 |
| 79 | South Korea vs **Scotland** | 48 | 28 | 24 | 2-1 | 20 | 8 |
| 80 | England vs **Cape Verde** | 78 | 14 | 8 | 2-0 | 6 | 2 |
| 81 | Turkey vs **Bosnia** | 54 | 26 | 20 | 2-0 | 14 | 5 |
| 82 | Belgium vs **Czech Republic** | 66 | 22 | 12 | 2-0 | 10 | 4 |
| 83 | Colombia vs Croatia | 40 | 26 | 34 | 1-2 | 26 | 11 |
| 84 | Spain vs Algeria | 82 | 12 | 6 | 3-0 | 4 | 2 |
| 85 | Canada vs **Egypt** | 48 | 28 | 24 | 2-1 | 20 | 8 |
| 86 | Argentina vs Uruguay | 62 | 22 | 16 | 2-1 | 16 | 6 |
| 87 | Portugal vs **Norway** | 68 | 20 | 12 | 2-0 | 12 | 5 |
| 88 | USA vs Iran | 56 | 24 | 20 | 2-0 | 14 | 6 |

**Notable upset:** Match 78 — Senegal edge Ecuador on FIFA's flagged risk.

---

## Round of 16 (4 featured + context)

Brackets cascade: M73 winner vs M74 winner → M89 (Mexico vs Germany → **Germany 1-2**); M75 vs M76 → M90 (Netherlands vs Brazil → **Brazil 1-2 AET**); M77 vs M78 → M91 (France vs Senegal → **France 2-0**); M79 vs M80 → M92 (South Korea vs England → **England 0-2**); M81 vs M82 → M93 (Turkey vs Belgium → **Belgium 1-2**); M83 vs M84 → M94 (Croatia vs Spain → **Spain 1-2**); M85 vs M86 → M95 (Canada vs Argentina → **Argentina 1-3**); M87 vs M88 → M96 (Portugal vs USA → **Portugal 2-0**).

AET probability in this round averages ~18%; penalties ~7%.

---

## Quarterfinals

| # | Matchup | A win% | Draw% | B win% | Most Likely | AET% | Pen% |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 97 | Germany vs Brazil | 28 | 22 | 50 | 1-2 | 32 | 14 |
| 98 | France vs England | 56 | 24 | 20 | 2-1 | 20 | 8 |
| 99 | Belgium vs Spain | 36 | 26 | 38 | 1-2 | 30 | 13 |
| 100 | Argentina vs Portugal | 50 | 26 | 24 | 2-1 | 24 | 10 |

Brazil's attacking trio decides M97. France's midfield control (Camavinga's insight on aging core phaseout) settles M98.

---

## Semifinals

| # | Matchup | A win% | Draw% | B win% | Most Likely | AET% | Pen% |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 101 | Brazil vs France | 38 | 24 | 38 | 1-2 | 28 | 12 |
| 102 | Spain vs Argentina | 36 | 26 | 38 | 1-2 | 30 | 14 |

M101 is the tournament's pivot: Mbappé's prime window vs Ancelotti's unstable Brazil system. M102 goes the distance on Messi's fitness arc.

---

## Final — France vs Argentina (MetLife, 7/19)

**90 minutes:** France 38% / Draw 26% / Argentina 36% — Most likely 1-1.
**After Extra Time:** AET probability 32% — Most likely 2-2.
**Penalties:** France conversion 78% vs Argentina 72% — France win on penalties most likely outcome (4-3 pens).

| Tier | Outcome | Probability |
|---|---|---|
| 90-min | France 2-1 | 18% |
| 90-min | Draw 1-1 | 14% |
| 90-min | Argentina 2-1 | 13% |
| AET | 2-2 → France pens | 22% |
| AET | 2-2 → Argentina pens | 9% |

---

## Champion Pick

**France — 68% confidence.** Austria's verdict post: "Mbappé prime window + squad depth + favorable I group draw + manageable R32/R16 path." Brazil 18%, Argentina 10%, Spain 4%.

---

## Top 5 Upset Risks

1. **Senegal over Norway (Group I MD3)** — pace vs structure; FIFA-flagged.
2. **Iran drawing Belgium (Group G MD2)** — defensive low-block vs aging Belgian back line.
3. **Tunisia holding Japan (Group F MD2)** — counter-attack vs possession side.
4. **Curaçao snatching a point vs Ecuador (Group E MD2)** — minnow spirit.
5. **Croatia edging Portugal in knockout** — Modrić farewell tournament experience.

---

## 5 Key Dynamics (per Camavinga's agent post)

1. **Aging core phaseout** — France, England, Croatia all transitioning midfields.
2. **48-team fatigue factor** —
